behavior_trees.planner_output:
Main plan:

1. Calculate the center of the target:  
   Center = ((1.8 + 3.2) / 2, (1.8 + 3.2) / 2) = (2.5, 2.5)

2. Calculate the angle to rotate:  
   Use the formula:  
   \(\text{angle} = \text{atan2}(y_{\text{center}} - y_{\text{Spot}}, x_{\text{center}} - x_{\text{Spot}})\)  
   \(\text{angle} = \text{atan2}(2.5 - 0.0, 2.5 - 0.0)\)  
   \(\text{angle} \approx 45.0\) degrees

3. Rotate Spot to face the target:  
   rotate_spot(45.0)

4. Check if target_ahead is true. If true, proceed to step 5. If false, call_llm().

5. Calculate the distance to the target:  
   Use the formula:  
   \(\text{distance} = \sqrt{(x_{\text{center}} - x_{\text{Spot}})^2 + (y_{\text{center}} - y_{\text{Spot}})^2}\)  
   \(\text{distance} = \sqrt{(2.5 - 0.0)^2 + (2.5 - 0.0)^2}\)  
   \(\text{distance} \approx 3.54\) meters

6. Move Spot forward by the calculated distance:  
   move_spot(3.54)

7. Check if at_goal is true. If true, finish_task(). If false, call_llm().

Main plan:

1. Calculate the center of the target:  
   Center = ((1.8 + 3.2) / 2, (1.8 + 3.2) / 2) = (2.5, 2.5)

2. Calculate the angle to rotate:  
   Use the formula:  
   \(\text{angle} = \text{atan2}(y_{\text{center}} - y_{\text{Spot}}, x_{\text{center}} - x_{\text{Spot}})\)  
   \(\text{angle} = \text{atan2}(2.5 - 0.0, 2.5 - 0.0)\)  
   \(\text{angle} \approx 45.0\) degrees

3. Rotate Spot to face the target:  
   rotate_spot(45.0)

4. Move Spot forward by 1 meter:  
   move_spot(1.0)

5. Calculate the new position of Spot:  
   New x = 0.0 + 1.0 * cos(45.0 degrees)  
   New y = 0.0 + 1.0 * sin(45.0 degrees)  
   New x ≈ 0.707, New y ≈ 0.707

6. Calculate the remaining distance to the target:  
   \(\text{new\_distance} = \sqrt{(2.5 - \text{New x})^2 + (2.5 - \text{New y})^2}\)  
   \(\text{new\_distance} \approx \sqrt{(2.5 - 0.707)^2 + (2.5 - 0.707)^2}\)  
   \(\text{new\_distance} \approx 2.49\) meters

7. Check if target_ahead is true. If true, proceed to step 8. If false, call_llm().

8. Move Spot forward by the remaining distance:  
   move_spot(2.49)

9. Check if at_goal is true. If true, finish_task(). If false, call_llm().

Main plan:

1. Calculate the center of the target:  
   Center = ((1.8 + 3.2) / 2, (1.8 + 3.2) / 2) = (2.5, 2.5)

2. Calculate the angle to rotate:  
   Use the formula:  
   \(\text{angle} = \text{atan2}(y_{\text{center}} - y_{\text{Spot}}, x_{\text{center}} - x_{\text{Spot}})\)  
   \(\text{angle} = \text{atan2}(2.5 - (-1.0), 2.5 - 0.0)\)  
   \(\text{angle} \approx 70.9\) degrees

3. Rotate Spot to face the target:  
   rotate_spot(70.9 - 90.0)  
   rotate_spot(-19.1)

4. Move Spot forward by 1 meter:  
   move_spot(1.0)

5. Calculate the new position of Spot:  
   New x = 0.0 + 1.0 * cos(70.9 degrees)  
   New y = -1.0 + 1.0 * sin(70.9 degrees)  
   New x ≈ 0.325, New y ≈ -0.174

6. Calculate the remaining distance to the target:  
   \(\text{new\_distance} = \sqrt{(2.5 - \text{New x})^2 + (2.5 - \text{New y})^2}\)  
   \(\text{new\_distance} \approx \sqrt{(2.5 - 0.325)^2 + (2.5 - (-0.174))^2}\)  
   \(\text{new\_distance} \approx 2.82\) meters

7. Move Spot forward by the remaining distance:  
   move_spot(2.82)

8. Check if at_goal is true. If true, finish_task(). If false, call_llm().
